batch_summary.note: 1 primary RF-15 flag(s). See primary_flags for details.

primary_flags.summary: False danger + inadequate-father false enumeration cluster. May 14 2024. ROW-5301: 'I'm way more comfortable with her spending a whole day with them than you' — written statement that strangers are safer with Olivia than her own father. ROW-5302: 'That's also really concerning that you don't trust yourself either' — self-danger conversion: Eli's reasonable caution about childcare recast as self-awareness of danger (Category E). ROW-5307-5316: false-enumeration list — 'You chose a cat over your daughter,' multiple inadequate-father allegations enumerated in text. Category C (predation narrative) + Category E (self-danger conversion). Sev-2. ADD-002: false danger narrative is part of systematic incest/predation campaign confirmed to have reached multiple third parties (Q1).
